title: Steve and Alex
description: Steve needs to help Alex in the love story of Steve and Alex. You have to be in Steven's place and collect the portal pieces from where Alex is stuck. Collect 10 obsidians and create the alexsin portal. and complete the track and go to the portal. be careful don't fall down you may die if you fall down. or you will explode if you touch the TNTs.
instructions: Move to WASD Arrow Keys Double Jump available Mobile Touch Control
